test.name: decision_engine_closed_loop_vus
test.objective: Measure achieved direct decision evaluations per second with fixed always-active VUs.
test.load_model: Closed loop: each VU sends a new request immediately after its previous request completes.
test.sustainability_definition: 0% errors and 0% timeouts during measured run.
